description: A smart pair of formal wear, Enter Office leather shoes from clarks is absolutely stylish with its punch detailing. This classic men's brogue comes with an anti-bacterial lining that makes it a healthy and comfortable all-day wear.UpperFull leather upper with strategically placed overlays and punched design detailing for breathable comfort and styleLacing system for a snug, customized FitBrand name embossed on lateral ankle for styleMidsolePU midsole for lightweight comfortDouble layered footbed that doesn& rsquo t flatten out easily offering soft, cushioned, all-day comfortBacterial lining for safe and healthy wearOutsoleHard-wearing outsole made of TPU for long-lasting wearDiscreet horizontal grooves on the forefoot and back heel for absolute grip and tractionRaised heel for ergonomic comfort and styleshoe careWipe surface with dry, clean cloth to remove dustUse a branded leather conditioner to restore shoe shineDo not store in direct sunlight
